title: VSaveModel Statement
description: Saves a model for a vision object on disk.
notes:
VSaveModel can be used in applications when you have several different part models but the same vision sequence can be used. Normally, a model for each object that requires it is stored in the Vision Guide data files. VSaveModel allows you to save the models into your own files so you can load them into other objects of the same type.

When you are using the Compact Vision, USB memory can be specified in filename. When selecting the USB memory, specify it as follows: CVUSB:\path\filename.

VSaveModel can be used for the following vision objects:

	Contour
	Correlation
	Geometric
	Polar
	DefectFinder
examples:
Integer status

VTeach seq1.corr01, status
If status = 1 Then VSaveModel seq1.corr01, "c:\models\corr01"
EndIf
